asymmetry: Nigel Farage charges fans £75+ for personalised video messages on Cameo while positioning himself as a man of the people fighting for ordinary Britons.
hook: Farage is charging fans £75 for a birthday shoutout.
core_fact: Nigel Farage listed himself on Cameo — a celebrity video-for-hire platform — charging approximately £75 per personalised message, while simultaneously claiming to be the authentic anti-establishment voice of working-class Britain.
share_trigger: Did you see this? Farage is literally selling personalised videos to his own supporters for £75 a pop — the man who says he's fighting for you is monetising your loyalty like a Z-list celebrity.
search_query: Nigel Farage Cameo video scandal 2025 Reform UK hypocrisy
